programme.title: Emergency
programme.desc: Dr Mark Putland and the Royal Melbourne Hospital trauma team have minutes to save a truck driver’s severed leg. Nurse Chelsea Jones fears a horse rider might be paralysed. Dr Michael Conboy struggles to reset a student’s dislocated jaw.

programme.title: Emergency
programme.desc: Emergency responders face real-life crises, including accidents, medical emergencies, and rescue operations. The show follows paramedics, police, and firefighters as they handle high-pressure situations. Through real footage and firsthand accounts, it reveals the intensity and urgency of emergency services.

programme.title: Real Emergency: Episode
programme.desc: Emergency responders face real-life crises, including accidents, medical emergencies, and rescue operations. The show follows paramedics, police, and firefighters as they handle high-pressure situations. Through real footage and firsthand accounts, it reveals the intensity and urgency of emergency services.

programme.title: Emergency
programme.desc: Doctors Jonathan Papson and Emmanuel Karpathakis fear a cyclist with glass sticking out of his neck could bleed out. Any movement could be catastrophic. Dr Mya Cubitt uses her phone light to see where her young patient is bleeding from.

programme.title: Emergency
programme.desc: Emergency responders face real-life crises, including accidents, medical emergencies, and rescue operations. The show follows paramedics, police, and firefighters as they handle high-pressure situations. Through real footage and firsthand accounts, it reveals the intensity and urgency of emergency services.
